You are missing required pak files to connect to this server.
The server gave a web page though:
%s

%s

zh: 你缺少连接此服务器所需的部分文件，且该服务器不提供下载。

en: Quake 4 is out of date, please visit www.Quake4Game.com for updates.

en: if set to 1, show item acquisition gui when picked up
zh: 设为 1 时，拾取物品会显示获取界面

id number as defined in guis/itemdefs.h

en: set to 1 and item will not spawn in easy mode

en: set to 1 and item will not spawn in hard mode

en: Gives the player an objective, trigger it to give the objective.
zh: 给予玩家一个任务目标，触发后即下达该目标。

en: name of inventory/objective item used for requirements

en: Completes a named objective, trigger it to complete the objective.
zh: 完成指定名称的任务目标，触发后即完成该目标。

zh: 使指定名称的任务目标失败，触发后该目标即告失败
要判定失败的任务目标
